info.title: Khazana POS API
info.description:
## Khazana POS Backend API

Available modules:
- **Auth** – Login, profile, change password
- **Users** – User management and role assignment
- **Sales** – Cash, credit, VAT cash, VAT credit sales
- **Inventory** – Items, stock receive / issue / adjust
- **Customers** – Customer management, ledger, payments
- **Roles** – Role management
- **Menus** – Menu items
- **Permissions** – Role-based permissions
- **Orders** – Sales orders (regular and VAT)
- **Pricing** – Sale prices and cost prices
- **Finance** – Money receive and cash purchases
- **Packets** – Packet stock management
- **NC Adjustment** – Non-conformance adjustments
- **Assortment** – Assortment records
- **Reports** – Sales, stock, item-wise, customer statements
- **Admin** – Branches, settings, banks, audit log

200.description: Returns access token and user profile

get.summary: Get all sales (filtered by type and branch)
Get current stock levels by branch
Get stock balance for an item
Get all permissions for a role

200.description: List of permissions for the role

post.summary: Create or update a single permission
Bulk create/update permissions for a role

get.summary: Get sale prices (optionally filter by item code)
Get current active price for an item on a given date

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date to check price (ISO 8601, defaults to today)

get.summary: Get cost prices (optionally filter by item code)

post.summary: Record a money receipt from customer

get.summary: Get sales report for a date range
Get current stock report for all items
Get item-wise sales report for a date range
Get customer statement for a date range
Get packet analysis report for a date range
